_comment: Allowlist of audited liquidity-locker contracts, per chain. An LP position held by an address NOT on this list gets no lock credit — an unknown 'locker' is unverified by definition. Additions require a human-reviewed PR citing the locker's audit and official docs (see CONTRIBUTING.md). Populated during the first curation pass in CI; entries here are placeholders until then.

evidence.vendorDeployment: uncx-network GitHub — liquidity-locker (UniV2) contracts repository, README deployments table lists this address as the Base lockerV2 deployment
evidence.audit: PENDING OWNER CITATION — docs.uncx.network unreachable from the authoring session; owner must add the audit link and cross-check the address on base.blockscout.com (verified source, UniswapV2Locker) before merging, or delete this entry
evidence.onChainCrossCheck: PENDING OWNER CHECK — base.blockscout.com address page: verified source, contract name UniswapV2Locker
